server.name: sage-kernel
server.description: MCP control surface for Sage Kernel OS.

tools.name: kernel.phase.status
tools.description: List kernel phase status.
tools.outputShape: Array of kernel phase records with id, name, status, goal, and completion criteria.
failureModes: Catalog phase file is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.catalog.search
tools.description: Search repos, modules, templates, integrations, and phases.
tools.outputShape: Array of matching catalog entries grouped by kind and original item payload.
failureModes: Catalog JSON files are missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.template.list
tools.description: List available project templates and QA profile mappings.
tools.outputShape: Array of template records with coverage, stack, and QA profile metadata.
failureModes: Template catalog is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.project.plan
tools.description: Create a project plan from a template, deployment target, QA profile, and infra profile.
tools.outputShape: Project plan object containing template, target, QA profile, infra plan, and next steps.

tools.name: kernel.project.scaffold
tools.description: Scaffold a local project skeleton from a kernel template.
tools.outputShape: Scaffold result with output path and generated file list.
failureModes: Output path is invalid or not writable.

tools.name: kernel.profile.detect
tools.description: Detect the project type, stack, SDLC profile, tests, CI, database, deployment, and evidence for a project path.
tools.outputShape: Project profile detection report with primary profile, secondary profiles, languages, frameworks, tests, CI, deployment, databases, evidence, and warnings.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed profile roots.

tools.name: kernel.profile.gaps
tools.description: Report missing profile proof, external evidence, and next hardening actions for a project path.
tools.outputShape: Profile gap report with primary/secondary profiles, loop proof status, missing evidence, and next actions.

examples.description: Find profile proof gaps for the active project.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed profile roots.

tools.name: kernel.done.generate
tools.description: Generate a machine-checkable definition of done from project profile, objective, and risk level.
tools.outputShape: Definition-of-done object with acceptance criteria, required checks, commands, evidence, rollback requirement, and stop conditions.

examples.description: Generate high-risk done criteria for the active project.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed profile roots.

tools.name: kernel.loop.plan
tools.description: Create a closed-loop SDLC workflow plan from the detected project profile, objective, and risk level.
tools.outputShape: Closed-loop workflow object with phases, commands, evidence, stop conditions, rollback expectation, and next actions.

examples.description: Plan a high-risk closed loop for the active project.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed profile roots.

tools.name: kernel.loop.run
tools.description: Execute the allowlisted closed-loop SDLC verification commands for a project path.
tools.outputShape: Closed-loop workflow execution with command results and next actions.

examples.description: Run a low-risk closed loop for the active project.

failureModes: One or more verification commands fail.
Project path is outside allowed profile roots.

tools.name: kernel.loop.validate
tools.description: Validate the built-in closed-loop workflow engine contract.
tools.outputShape: Validation report for closed-loop workflow structure and required gates.

tools.name: kernel.loop.prove
tools.description: Run deterministic test-fixtures for the closed-loop workflow engine.
tools.outputShape: Proof report for plan, dry-run, and runner-backed closed-loop workflows.

tools.name: kernel.loop.score
tools.description: Score a profile-aware SDLC loop and report hard evidence gaps.
tools.outputShape: Loop score with profile, required checks, phases, hard gaps, and status.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed profile roots.

tools.name: kernel.loop.full_cycle
tools.description: Plan and score a full SDLC cycle across profile detection, done criteria, loop, review, security, testing, and score.
tools.outputShape: Full-cycle plan and scorecard without mutating the target project.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed profile roots.
Review, security, or testing proof cannot be generated.

tools.name: kernel.workflow_engine.validate
tools.description: Validate the canonical state-machine workflow engine definition used by CLI, MCP, and dashboard controls.
tools.outputShape: Workflow engine validation report with status, state coverage, checked step count, and failures.

examples.description: Validate the built-in workflow engine definition.

failureModes: A command-required step is missing a command.

tools.name: kernel.workflow_engine.prove
tools.description: Run the deterministic workflow engine test-fixture that fails, repairs through a bounded retry, and passes.
tools.sideEffects: creates a temporary test-fixture project and runs npm test inside it
tools.outputShape: Workflow engine proof report with before failure, repaired workflow run, after pass, audit trail, and repair evidence.
failureModes: The controlled failing test does not fail before repair.
The repaired test-fixture test does not pass.

tools.name: kernel.workflow_engine.run
tools.description: Run a caller-provided state-machine workflow definition with retries, approvals, rollback, and audit records.
tools.sideEffects: runs local workflow commands declared by the provided workflow definition
tools.outputShape: Workflow execution report with final status, state, validation, step results, repairs, rollback entries, audit trail, and next actions.

examples.description: Run a read-only inspect and review workflow.

failureModes: A workflow command fails after retry budget.

tools.name: kernel.warehouse.summary
tools.description: Summarize the connected AI Warehouse inventory.
tools.outputShape: AI Warehouse summary with inventory counts and maturity/category breakdowns.
failureModes: Warehouse index is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.warehouse.search
tools.description: Search the AI Warehouse index for tools, categories, tags, and verdicts.
tools.outputShape: Array of AI Warehouse tool matches with slug, name, verdict, maturity, tags, and summary.
failureModes: Warehouse index is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.qa.profile
tools.description: Return the QA profile for a template.
tools.outputShape: QA profile object for the requested template, including commands and gates.

tools.name: kernel.qa.plan
tools.description: Plan QA gates for a template without executing them.
tools.outputShape: QA execution plan with selected profile, mode, checks, and commands without executing them.

tools.name: kernel.qa.run
tools.description: Run safe local QA for the kernel or a generated project.
tools.outputShape: Signed QA report with project path, mode, status, checks, timestamps, and signature.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.
Project package or required files are missing.

tools.name: kernel.repo.inspect
tools.description: Inspect a cataloged source repo without mutating it.
tools.outputShape: Repository inspection with existence, package metadata, readme preview, and source path.
failureModes: Repo is not in the catalog.

tools.name: kernel.infra.plan
tools.description: Return an infrastructure plan for a template and deploy target.
tools.outputShape: Infrastructure plan with deploy target, environment requirements, readiness checks, and rollback notes.

tools.name: kernel.deploy.prepare
tools.description: Prepare a deploy readiness plan with QA, infra, env, rollback, and approval gates.
tools.outputShape: Deploy readiness object combining QA gates, infra plan, environment checks, rollback, and approval requirements.

tools.name: kernel.jobs.list
tools.description: List local safe jobs and approval boundaries.
tools.outputShape: Array of job definitions with id, risk, schedule, approval boundary, and steps.
failureModes: Job registry is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.jobs.run
tools.description: Run a local safe job and write run history.
tools.outputShape: Job run summary with run id, job id, status, duration, path, and step results.
failureModes: Signed approval is missing or invalid.

tools.name: kernel.jobs.runs
tools.description: List recent local job runs.
tools.outputShape: Array of recent job run summaries with status, duration, timestamp, and path.
failureModes: Run history directory or database rows are unreadable.

tools.name: kernel.jobs.enqueue
tools.description: Enqueue a durable local job in SQLite.
tools.outputShape: Queued job record with id, job id, status, priority, payload, attempts, and next run time.

tools.name: kernel.worker.tick
tools.description: Run one durable worker queue tick.
tools.sideEffects: runs one local queued job if ready
tools.outputShape: Worker tick result showing claimed job, execution status, and queue transition.

tools.name: kernel.approvals.request
tools.description: Record an approval request in the local approval ledger.
tools.outputShape: Approval record with id, action, status, reason, payload, and creation timestamp.

tools.name: kernel.approvals.list
tools.description: List approval ledger entries.
tools.outputShape: Array of approval records filtered by optional status.

tools.name: kernel.approvals.approve
tools.description: Approve and sign a pending approval request in the local approval ledger.
tools.sideEffects: writes signed local SQLite approval state
tools.outputShape: Signed approval record with approved status, decidedBy, decidedAt, and signature.

tools.name: kernel.dashboard.snapshot
tools.description: Return DB-backed dashboard state for the live command center.
tools.outputShape: Dashboard snapshot with version, health, DB counts, approvals, jobs, repos, templates, artifacts, and metrics inputs.
failureModes: Catalog files are missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.semantic.index_project
tools.description: Build a bounded read-only semantic index for a project path.
tools.outputShape: Semantic index with adapter metadata, module summaries, extracted symbols, and bounded reference terms.
failureModes: Project path is outside the kernel root.

tools.name: kernel.semantic.search_symbol
tools.description: Search detected symbols in the bounded local semantic index.
tools.outputShape: Symbol search result with query, count, and matching symbol records.
failureModes: Project path is outside the kernel root.

tools.name: kernel.semantic.find_references
tools.description: Find bounded text references for a symbol or term in the local semantic index.
tools.outputShape: Reference search result with file, line, and trimmed text for each hit.
failureModes: Project path is outside the kernel root.

tools.name: kernel.semantic.summarize_module
tools.description: Summarize one module using the local semantic analyzer.
tools.outputShape: Module summary with language, line count, symbols, imports, exports, and a short generated summary.
failureModes: File path is outside the kernel root.
Module file is missing or unreadable.

tools.name: kernel.adapters.list
tools.description: List built-in and optional external adapters with discovery status, capabilities, and install hints.
tools.outputShape: Adapter discovery report with status summary, capabilities, mutation policy, permission, configured environment keys, and install hints.
failureModes: Optional adapter catalog is missing or malformed.
Configured adapter command is missing from PATH.
Optional adapter is intentionally disabled by environment.

tools.name: kernel.runbooks.list
tools.description: List validated local runbooks for daily engineering operations.
tools.outputShape: Runbook catalog with ids, titles, risk, approval requirement, steps, and verification commands.
failureModes: Runbook catalog JSON is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.runbooks.plan_day
tools.description: Generate a local daily engineering plan grounded in phases, evals, runbooks, and memory.
tools.outputShape: Daily plan with objective, phase, risks, steps, gates, and evidence summary.
failureModes: Catalog phase file is missing or malformed.
Eval report is missing, producing a needs_attention plan.
Memory store cannot initialize, producing fallback evidence.

tools.name: kernel.runbooks.generate_adr
tools.description: Generate an Architecture Decision Record draft without executing commands.
tools.outputShape: ADR object with id, title, status, markdown, and optional root-bounded output path.
failureModes: Output path is outside the project root.

tools.name: kernel.runbooks.execute_step
tools.description: Execute one allowlisted runbook step with signed approval, timeout, rollback metadata, and audit records.
tools.sideEffects: may execute allowlisted local commands and writes audit/artifact records
tools.outputShape: Runbook step execution result with status, command, timeout, duration, stdout/stderr excerpts, rollback metadata, and audit record.

examples.description: Plan a runbook step without executing it.

failureModes: Signed approval is missing or invalid for execution.
Runbook or step id is unknown.
Command is not in the runbook execution allowlist.
Step command times out or exits non-zero.

tools.name: kernel.dogfood.prod
tools.description: Audit three production repos against kernel QA readiness without mutating them.
tools.outputShape: Dogfood audit report with configured source root, targets, checks, QA status, and failed QA checks.
failureModes: QA report is malformed or failed.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.audit_repo
tools.description: Audit the active project and return QA status, dashboard health, pending approvals, and next actions.
tools.sideEffects: runs local QA commands and may write local audit records
tools.outputShape: Daily audit report with QA result, dashboard health summary, pending approval count, and next actions.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.run_full_qa
tools.description: Run a full QA workflow against a project path and summarize failures.
tools.sideEffects: runs local QA commands and may write local audit records
tools.outputShape: Full QA workflow report with mode, QA status, failed checks, and next actions.

examples.description: Run standard QA on the current repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.explain_failures
tools.description: Explain failed checks from a QA report or by running a fast local QA pass.
tools.outputShape: Failure explanation with failed check names, command output excerpts, and recommended rerun steps.

examples.description: Explain a provided failed QA report.

failureModes: Fallback QA run fails before producing JSON.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.create_app
tools.description: Create a production-ready app from a Sage Kernel template and return next steps.
tools.outputShape: Create-app workflow result with template plan, scaffold output, status, and next actions.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.release_readiness
tools.description: Check local release readiness from deployment plan, dashboard health, and approval state.
tools.outputShape: Release readiness report with deployment plan, checks, status, and next actions.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.pending_approvals
tools.description: Show pending approval requests with review guidance.
tools.outputShape: Approval inbox report with status filter, count, approval records, and next actions.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.stress_dashboard
tools.description: Stress test the local dashboard or health endpoint and return latency/failure metrics.
tools.outputShape: Dashboard stress report with request count, concurrency, failures, throughput, and latency percentiles.

tools.name: kernel.workflow.daily_summary
tools.description: Summarize today's kernel state for daily app-building work.
tools.outputShape: Daily summary with dashboard health, DB counts, tool count, pending approvals, recent runs, and next actions.

tools.name: kernel.agents.list
tools.description: List installed source agent profiles from the Sage global agent pack.
tools.outputShape: Agent profile list with id, title, source path, byte size, and content hash.
failureModes: Agent manifest is missing or malformed.

tools.name: kernel.agents.validate
tools.description: Validate the source global agent pack and SDLC profile coverage.
tools.outputShape: Validation report with status, coverage counts, and failures.

tools.name: kernel.agents.doctor
tools.description: Check whether the Sage global agent pack is installed into the active user home.
tools.outputShape: Doctor report with source pack, global file, manifest, and installed profile checks.
failureModes: One or more installed profiles are missing.

tools.name: kernel.agents.install_global
tools.description: Install the Sage global agent pack into the active user home with backup handling.
tools.sideEffects: writes AGENTS.md and profile files under the selected user home
tools.outputShape: Install result with target path, manifest path, profile directory, and backup paths.

tools.name: kernel.agent.roles
tools.description: List executable agent roles, missions, allowed tools, forbidden actions, and policies.
tools.outputShape: Executable agent role catalog with bounded permissions, quality checklist, memory policy, and approval policy.

tools.name: kernel.agent.validate
tools.description: Validate executable agent role manifests and policy coverage.
tools.outputShape: Agent runtime validation report with role count, required-role coverage, policy coverage, and failures.
failureModes: A role is missing permissions, policies, or quality checklist.

tools.name: kernel.agent.run
tools.description: Run one bounded read-only agent against a project and return evidence-backed findings and scorecard inputs.
tools.outputShape: Agent task result with role metadata, project evidence, findings, permission policy, and next actions.

examples.description: Run the reviewer agent against the active repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.agent.eval
tools.description: Run deterministic evals for executable agent role contracts, task execution, and council review.
tools.outputShape: Agent eval report with pass/fail status for role contracts, agent execution, and council review.

tools.name: kernel.council.review
tools.description: Run multiple bounded agent roles and merge their findings into one engineering council decision.
tools.outputShape: Council review result with per-agent results, scorecards, deduplicated severity-ranked findings, decision, and next actions.

examples.description: Run the default engineering council against the active repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.inspect_repo
tools.description: Inspect a project for scripts, docs, tests, CI, package metadata, and engineering surfaces.
tools.outputShape: Repository inspection summary with project metadata, counts, scripts, docs, CI, surfaces, and findings.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.architecture_audit
tools.description: Score architecture readiness from detected project surfaces and structure.
tools.outputShape: Architecture category score with findings and evidence references.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.clean_code_audit
tools.description: Score clean-code readiness from scripts, file size signals, and validation coverage.
tools.outputShape: Clean-code category score with findings and evidence references.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.test_audit
tools.description: Score testing readiness from test files, test scripts, coverage gates, and E2E signals.
tools.outputShape: Testing category score with findings and evidence references.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.security_audit
tools.description: Score security readiness from policy docs, security scripts, and audit signals.
tools.outputShape: Security category score with findings and evidence references.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.diff_review
tools.description: Review a git diff for risky files, security-sensitive changes, missing route tests, and severity/confidence findings.
tools.outputShape: Diff review with changed files, risk classification, severity/confidence findings, and pass/needs-work status.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.route_test_map
tools.description: Map route/API files to direct tests and report untested route surfaces.
tools.outputShape: Route-to-test map with route counts, matching tests, untested route findings, and status.

examples.description: Map current repo routes to tests.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.quality_score
tools.description: Create a full senior engineering quality score report for a project.
tools.outputShape: Inspection plus validated review report with architecture, clean-code, testing, security, and release scores.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.review.senior_review
tools.description: Run the Senior Review Engine 2.0 across repo inspection, risky diff review, route/test mapping, and quality scoring.
tools.outputShape: Senior review result with inspection, diff review, route-test map, validated report, status, and remaining work.

examples.description: Run senior review for the current repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.
Senior review report cannot be constructed.

tools.name: kernel.review.release_proof
tools.description: Create a release-proof review report with expected command evidence references.
tools.outputShape: Release-proof review report with release evidence, score, remaining work, and status.

examples.description: Create release proof for the current repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed review roots.

tools.name: kernel.security.threat_model
tools.description: Generate a structured threat model from project surfaces, assets, identities, trust boundaries, and external systems.
tools.outputShape: Threat model with assets, identities, external systems, trust boundaries, threats, mitigations, and required reviews.

examples.description: Generate a threat model for the current repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed security roots.

tools.name: kernel.security.supply_chain
tools.description: Generate an SBOM-style dependency inventory, license gate, dependency-risk gate, and OpenSSF-style scorecard.
tools.outputShape: Supply-chain report with SBOM components, license status, dependency risk findings, scorecard, and status.

examples.description: Run supply-chain gate for the current repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed security roots.

tools.name: kernel.security.proof
tools.description: Run the complete security proof combining threat model and supply-chain gates.
tools.outputShape: Security proof report with threat-model, supply-chain, license, dependency-risk, and scorecard gates.

examples.description: Run complete security proof for the current repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed security roots.

tools.name: kernel.cockpit.status
tools.description: Gather the terminal cockpit snapshot: proof-ledger totals, recent proofs, and latest evidence-report statuses.
tools.outputShape: Cockpit snapshot with proofs (total/passed/failed/recent) and evidence statuses.

examples.description: Read the live kernel cockpit status.

failureModes: Proof ledger or evidence directory cannot be read.

tools.name: kernel.security.polyglot
tools.description: Pattern-level SAST for Python and Swift (command injection, eval/exec, insecure deserialization, TLS-verify-off, weak hash, insecure WebView/keychain), with optional external deep-scanner fold.
tools.outputShape: Polyglot SAST report: status, languages, filesScanned, high count, findings[], summary.

tools.name: kernel.chaos.matrix
tools.description: Run the resilience fault-injection matrix: lease contention, stale/dead-holder takeover, corrupt-lock recovery, ledger partial-write detection, DAG fail-closed, durable resume, concurrent-run isolation.
tools.outputShape: Chaos matrix report: status, total, passed, scenarios[] each with status and evidence.

examples.description: Prove the kernel's IO primitives recover under fault injection.

failureModes: A recovery invariant is violated (a scenario fails).

tools.name: kernel.perf.incremental
tools.description: Run the incremental SAST cache cold then warm and report the speedup, cache hit/miss rates, and that warm findings match cold (proves incremental analysis works).
tools.outputShape: Perf report: status, filesScanned, cold/warm perf stats, findings count, incremental-gain verdict.

examples.description: Measure incremental analysis speedup on the repo.

tools.name: kernel.runtime.gate
tools.description: Evaluate production-grade runtime readiness (Lighthouse scores, browser console errors, critical-flow smoke) against thresholds; reports blocked_not_available when no app/browser toolchain is present.
tools.outputShape: Runtime verdict: status (passed|failed|blocked_not_available), capability, and lighthouse/console/smoke sub-verdicts when run live.

examples.description: Check runtime/production-grade readiness of the target.

tools.name: kernel.autonomy.harness
tools.description: Run the self-healing close-loop over a seeded-bug corpus with the deterministic known-fix fixer; reports detect-rate, close-rate, rollback count, and the no-fake-close invariant.
tools.outputShape: Autonomy harness report: total, detected, closed, rolledBack, detectRate, closeRate, noFakeClose, results[].

examples.description: Prove the self-healing loop mechanics (detect -> fix -> re-verify -> rollback).

failureModes: A seeded bug's detector cannot run.

tools.name: kernel.intake.prd
tools.description: Synthesize a structured PRD (goals, user stories, requirements, non-goals, risks) from a one-line idea + profile; every profile required-check becomes a covered requirement.
tools.outputShape: PRD: idea, profileId, goals[], userStories[], requirements[], nonGoals[], risks[], coversAllRequiredChecks.
failureModes: Idea is empty (still produces a profile-derived PRD).

tools.name: kernel.intake.design
tools.description: Derive a minimal architecture (components, data flows, ADR decisions) from an idea + profile.
tools.outputShape: Architecture: profileId, components[], dataFlows[], decisions[] (ADR stubs).
failureModes: Idea is empty (still produces a profile-derived design).

tools.name: kernel.intake.contract
tools.description: Full intake: idea + profile -> PRD + architecture + a VALID executable task contract (the loop's input) + a generation spec. Closes the gap from intent to the proven engineering loop.
tools.outputShape: { prd, design, contract, spec, contractValid, contractErrors } — contract is a ready/implementable task contract.
failureModes: Idea is empty (produces a profile-derived contract).

tools.name: kernel.generation.scaffold
tools.description: Generate code files from an idea + profile (via intake spec). Returns the file set WITHOUT writing — generated code must pass kernel.generation.prove before use.
tools.outputShape: { name, profileId, files:[{path, content}] } — a preview file set, not written to disk.
failureModes: The derived generation spec is invalid.

tools.name: kernel.generation.prove
tools.description: Generate code from an idea + profile and run the prove-or-discard gate over it (SAST + polyglot + parse). Accepts only when there are zero high findings and all code parses.
tools.outputShape: { accepted, fileCount, high, unparseable[], findings[], reason } — generated code is never trusted until this accepts.
failureModes: The derived generation spec is invalid.

tools.name: kernel.security.dataflow
tools.description: Cross-file (interprocedural) taint analysis: untrusted input in one file forwarded to an imported function whose parameter reaches a shell/eval/SQL sink. Conservative direct-call chains (depth<=2).
tools.outputShape: { status, filesScanned, high, findings[] (each with sourceFile/sinkFile/depth), depthLimit }.

examples.description: Scan the repo for cross-file taint chains.

failureModes: A high-severity interprocedural taint chain is found.

tools.name: kernel.deploy.verify_rollback
tools.description: Run the deploy->verify->rollback loop with the real local provider: a healthy deploy is kept; a bad deploy fails verification and is rolled back to the previous good version (fail-closed). Cloud providers are credential-gated.
tools.outputShape: { happyPath, failurePath, restoredTo } — proves a bad deploy never stays live.
failureModes: Local server cannot bind a port.

tools.name: kernel.sdlc.e2e
tools.description: Run the full SDLC arc on an isolated fixture: idea -> intake contract -> generation (prove-or-discard) -> SAST -> dataflow -> runtime -> deploy(verify/rollback) -> score. A defect injected at generation stops the pipeline before deploy (fail-closed).
tools.outputShape: { status, stoppedAt, score, stages:[{stage,status}] } — proves the whole idea->proven arc composes.

examples.description: Run the full SDLC pipeline for a payments idea.

failureModes: A stage fails; or with injectDefect the pipeline stops before deploy.

tools.name: kernel.enforce.proof_gate
tools.description: Enforcement gate: returns whether the CURRENT working state is backed by a fresh, untampered, PASSING operate:run proof matching the current git diff. Blocks done when work was edited after the last proof. Used as a Stop-hook to make the proof loop mandatory.
tools.outputShape: { allowed, reason, proofId?, diffHash? } — allowed only when a passing operate:run proof matches the current diff and the ledger verifies clean.

examples.description: Check if current work is proof-backed before declaring done.

failureModes: Not a git repo (cannot bind a proof to the working state).

tools.name: kernel.contract.install
tools.description: Render the single canonical Sage Operating Contract into a target project per model client (CLAUDE.md / .cursorrules / AGENTS.md). One source, idempotent, between managed markers so hand-authored content is preserved. Makes the kernel model-agnostic across Claude Code, Cursor, and other agents.
tools.outputShape: { written:[clientFile...], contractHash, root } — the client files updated and the sha256 of the canonical contract body.

examples.description: Install the operating contract into the current project for all default clients.

tools.name: kernel.goal.drive
tools.description: Long-horizon autonomous driver: decompose a single objective into a task DAG, drive each task through the proof-first operate loop in dependency order (skipping tasks already backed by a passing proof), and loop to whole-goal acceptance. Returns a TYPED stop reason (completed / blocked_unsatisfiable / blocked_task_failed / needs_approval / max_rounds). Idempotent re-runs.
tools.outputShape: { goalId, objective, stopReason, completed, detail, tasks:[{id,status,skipped?}], proofId } — every task and the goal are anchored in the ledger.

examples.description: Drive an objective decomposed into an explicit task DAG.

failureModes: Task DAG contains a dependency cycle (blocked_unsatisfiable).
A task requires approval and approve was not set (needs_approval).

tools.name: kernel.security.sast
tools.description: Run AST-based static application security testing for command injection, dynamic code execution, path traversal, and prototype pollution.
tools.outputShape: SAST report with status, high/medium counts, files scanned, and findings (rule, severity, evidence, recommendation).

examples.description: Run static security analysis over the current repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed security roots.
Source files cannot be parsed for analysis.

tools.name: kernel.testing.strategy
tools.description: Generate a profile-aware test strategy with required layers, proof expectations, commands, and evidence.
tools.outputShape: Test strategy with profile, layers, missing layers, required commands, evidence, and definition of done.

examples.description: Generate testing strategy for current repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.

tools.name: kernel.testing.playwright_template
tools.description: Generate Playwright starter files for browser, mobile viewport, and page-object E2E proof.
tools.outputShape: Playwright template file map with config, smoke spec, page object, and setup instructions.

examples.description: Generate Playwright template for current repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.

tools.name: kernel.testing.performance_budget
tools.description: Generate performance budgets and stress/soak profiles for the detected project type.
tools.outputShape: Performance budget with latency, memory, throughput, stress profiles, and release evidence requirements.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.

tools.name: kernel.testing.proof
tools.description: Run the complete testing lab proof across strategy, Playwright template, performance budgets, and long-soak plan.
tools.outputShape: Testing lab proof with strategy, Playwright template, performance budget, and release soak plan.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.

tools.name: kernel.evidence.list
tools.description: List local Sage evidence artifacts such as run records, exports, and backups.
tools.outputShape: Evidence artifact list with kind, path, size, and modified timestamp.
failureModes: Evidence directories are missing or unreadable.

tools.name: kernel.evidence.compare
tools.description: Compare two local JSON evidence artifacts and report status or score changes.
tools.outputShape: Evidence comparison with summarized left/right status and score delta.

tools.name: kernel.postmortem.generate
tools.description: Generate a postmortem draft from a failed loop, stress run, or verification gate.
tools.outputShape: Postmortem draft with failure, impact, hypotheses, prevention rules, and next actions.
failureModes: Input failure context is too vague for useful postmortem detail.

tools.name: kernel.redteam.agent_safety
tools.description: Generate hostile agent-safety scenarios for prompt injection, unsafe tools, poisoned memory, huge logs, and destructive commands.
tools.outputShape: Agent safety red-team scenario matrix with expected defenses and missing automation.

examples.description: Generate red-team scenarios for current repo.

failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.

tools.name: kernel.benchmark.matrix
tools.description: Create a real-repo benchmark matrix with detected profiles, recommended commands, and stress commands.
tools.outputShape: Benchmark matrix over local project paths with profile detection and recommended proof commands.
failureModes: One or more project paths are outside allowed profile roots.

tools.name: kernel.memory.policy
tools.description: Evaluate whether a proposed memory write is allowed, approval-required, or blocked by policy.
tools.outputShape: Memory policy decision with status, scope, approval requirement, confidence, failures, and allowed kinds.

input.summary: Use contract tests for MCP tools.

tools.name: kernel.memory.graph
tools.description: Build a local engineering knowledge graph from project, framework, route, test, and dependency evidence.
tools.outputShape: Knowledge graph with nodes, edges, project metadata, and queryable relationships.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.

tools.name: kernel.memory.learning_propose
tools.description: Propose a policy-checked memory update from a failure and fix without writing permanent memory.
tools.outputShape: Learning proposal with policy decision and normalized memory record candidate.
failureModes: Project path is outside allowed roots.

tools.name: kernel.memory.learning_approve
tools.description: Approve a previously proposed learning update and return the approved memory record.
tools.outputShape: Approved learning update with approved memory record and approval metadata.
failureModes: Proposal was not in proposed state.

tools.name: kernel.drift.map
tools.description: Create a drift map for scope, architecture, routes, MCP tools, docs, tests, and permissions.
tools.outputShape: Drift map with architecture directories, MCP parity counts, dashboard routes, docs, tests, permissions, and findings.
failureModes: MCP manifest or dispatcher files are malformed.

tools.name: kernel.drift.scope
tools.description: Detect scope creep against allowed repository areas, denied patterns, and test-coverage expectations.
tools.outputShape: Scope report with inspected files, allowed scopes, denied patterns, and blocking findings.
failureModes: Git status is unavailable and filesystem fallback cannot be scanned.
Denied files are present in the inspected scope.

tools.name: kernel.drift.self_audit
tools.description: Compare implementation against generated docs, MCP contracts, package scripts, release gates, and permissions.
tools.outputShape: Self-audit report with parity checks for MCP dispatcher, contracts, docs, permissions, scripts, and release gates.
failureModes: Generated docs or contracts are stale.
Permission guard does not match MCP risk metadata.

tools.name: kernel.drift.proof
tools.description: Run the complete drift proof by combining drift map, scope-creep detection, and self-audit checks.
tools.outputShape: Complete drift proof with status, map, scope report, self-audit report, findings, and remaining work.

examples.description: Prove the repo has not drifted from its control-plane contracts.

failureModes: Any drift map, scope, contract, documentation, or permission check has a blocking finding.

tools.name: kernel.proof.record
tools.description: Record an append-only, tamper-evident proof entry for a command or tool run.
tools.sideEffects: Appends a record to the local proof ledger.
tools.outputShape: Recorded proof object with proofId, inputHash, outputHash, git state, prevHash, and recordHash.

examples.description: Record a passing test run as a proof.

failureModes: Proof record is malformed and is rejected before being persisted.
The proof ledger directory is not writable.

tools.name: kernel.proof.get
tools.description: Fetch a single proof record by proofId.
tools.outputShape: A single proof record, or null when no record matches the proofId.
failureModes: The proof ledger does not exist yet.

tools.name: kernel.proof.list
tools.description: List proof records, optionally filtered by runId, status, or tool.
tools.outputShape: An array of proof records matching the requested filters.
failureModes: The proof ledger does not exist yet.

tools.name: kernel.proof.verify
tools.description: Verify proof integrity: a single proofId, or the whole ledger hash chain when no id is given.
tools.outputShape: Verification verdict with status (verified, tampered, missing, or empty) and a list of issues.

examples.description: Verify the entire proof ledger chain.

failureModes: The proof ledger does not exist yet.
A record or artifact was tampered with after it was written.

tools.name: kernel.proof_graph.build
tools.description: Build a proof graph from real repo state (goal, git changed files, test imports, and ledger proofs) and persist it.
tools.sideEffects: Writes the latest proof graph to the local evidence directory.
tools.outputShape: Proof graph object with typed nodes and edges connecting goals to evidence.

examples.description: Build a proof graph for the current goal.

failureModes: The repository is not a git work tree, so changed files cannot be derived.

tools.name: kernel.proof_graph.query
tools.description: Query the latest proof graph by node type, edge type, or endpoint.
tools.outputShape: Filtered nodes and edges from the latest proof graph.

examples.description: List all claim nodes in the graph.

failureModes: No proof graph has been built yet.

tools.name: kernel.proof_graph.validate
tools.description: Validate the latest proof graph: structure, claims without a proof path, and release gates without proof edges.
tools.outputShape: Validation result with status, findings, and node/edge/claim counts.
failureModes: No proof graph has been built yet.
A claim or release gate has no path to a passing proof.

tools.name: kernel.claims.verify
tools.description: Verify a report or final answer against the proof ledger: reject success claims with no backing proof, downgrade stale evidence, and reject unsupported public-release or client-connection claims.
tools.outputShape: Verification result with status, per-claim findings, and violations.

examples.description: Verify a claim that cites a proof id.

failureModes: Text contains a success claim with no backing proof.
Text contains a stale or external claim that cannot be evidenced.

tools.name: kernel.contract.create
tools.description: Convert a goal into an executable task contract: objective, profile, risk classification, and required test/review/security/release gates.
tools.outputShape: Task contract with profile, risk classification, required gates, and status (ready or blocked_missing_acceptance_criteria).

examples.description: Create a contract for an auth feature.

tools.name: kernel.contract.validate
tools.description: Validate a task contract against the contract schema.
tools.outputShape: Validation result with valid flag and a list of errors.
failureModes: The contract is missing required fields.

tools.name: kernel.risk.classify_diff
tools.description: Classify changed files (or the current git diff) into risk classes and the gate categories they require.
tools.outputShape: Risk classification with riskLevel, classes, per-file classes, and requiredGates.
failureModes: The repository is not a git work tree and no files were provided.

tools.name: kernel.testing.impact
tools.description: Map changed files to the tests that exercise them via import analysis and a static surface map.
tools.outputShape: Impact map with per-file mapped tests, uncovered files, and required tests.

examples.description: Map tests for a changed MCP tool file.

failureModes: A risky changed file has no mapped test (uncovered).

tools.name: kernel.operate.run
tools.description: Run the daily SDLC operating loop for a goal: contract, profile, risk, test impact, required gates, bounded repair, score, and an evidence-backed report.
tools.sideEffects: Runs required gates, records proofs, and writes the proof graph.
tools.outputShape: Operate report with status, contractId, score, gates, blockers, nextActions, evidenceIds, and claim-firewall result.

examples.description: Run the loop for a documentation change.

failureModes: Acceptance criteria are missing, so implementation is blocked.
A required gate fails and cannot be repaired within budget.

tools.name: kernel.testing.mutation
tools.description: Run mutation testing on a target file against its tests: plant faults and verify the tests kill them. Surviving mutants lower the mutation score.
tools.sideEffects: Temporarily rewrites the target file while mutating; the original is always restored.
tools.outputShape: Mutation report with mutationScore, killed/total counts, surviving mutants, and restored flag.
failureModes: Surviving mutants put the mutation score below the threshold.
The target file or test files do not exist.

tools.name: kernel.agents.route
tools.description: Select the right agent for each gate of a goal, based on detected languages, profile, and risk.
tools.outputShape: Routing plan with profile, languages, risk level, and an agent assignment per gate.

examples.description: Route agents for an auth feature.

tools.name: kernel.hallucination.scan
tools.description: Measure the hallucination rate of a report or answer: the fraction of success claims with no backing evidence (unsupported, stale, or external_unproven).
tools.outputShape: Hallucination report with totalClaims, supportedClaims, hallucinatedClaims, rate, and the offending lines.

examples.description: Scan a report for hallucinated claims.

input.text: The release is done and shipped.

failureModes: The text contains success claims with no backing proof.

tools.name: kernel.profile.learn
tools.description: Record an operator profile correction for this repository so future runs pick it automatically. Tracks detection accuracy over time.
tools.sideEffects: Writes a per-repo profile override to the local learning store.
tools.outputShape: The recorded override plus learning stats (overrides, feedback, detection accuracy).

examples.description: Teach the kernel that this repo is an mcp-server.

tools.name: kernel.daemon.status
tools.description: Report the daemon supervisor status from its heartbeat: running, stale, or stopped, with age and restart count.
tools.outputShape: Status (running/stale/stopped) with heartbeat age and the latest heartbeat record.

tools.name: kernel.operate.diagnose
tools.description: Diagnose a failing gate's output: classify the failure, localize the file:line, and emit a targeted repair instruction.
tools.outputShape: Diagnosis with category, message, primaryLocation, impactedFiles, and a repair instruction.
failureModes: The output contains no recognizable error.

tools.name: kernel.agents.verify
tools.description: Adversarially verify a claim/fix: N independent verifiers must reach a strict majority. Provider-gated (blocked_not_implemented without verifiers).
tools.outputShape: Verdict (verified/rejected/blocked_not_implemented) with confirmed/total/needed and per-verifier votes.

tools.name: kernel.evals.model_rubric
tools.description: Run a model-backed eval: pass@1/pass@k/pass^k plus hallucination rate from stochastic samples. Provider-gated (blocked_not_implemented without a grader).
tools.outputShape: Eval result with passAt1, passAtK, passPowerK, hallucinationRate, and per-sample results.

tools.name: kernel.evals.ground
tools.description: Factual grounding: flag references to files that do not exist in the repository (factual hallucinations beyond unbacked claims).
tools.outputShape: Grounding result with status, references, and ungrounded (non-existent) file references.
failureModes: The text references files that do not exist in the repo.

tools.name: kernel.learning.outcomes
tools.description: Per-repo outcome learning: loop pass-rate statistics and the recommended loop based on evidenced outcomes.
tools.outputShape: Outcome stats per loop plus the outcome-learned recommendation (or null when insufficient data).

tools.name: kernel.learning.recall_fix
tools.description: Recall the most similar past fix for a failure signature via vector (cosine) similarity over the fix knowledge base.
tools.outputShape: The closest past fix above threshold (with similarity score) or a no_match status.

examples.description: Recall a fix for an assertion failure.

failureModes: No sufficiently similar past fix exists.

tools.name: kernel.policy.explain
tools.description: Explain the capability policy decision for a requested action (write_path, command, or network), including whether it is allowed and whether approval is required.
tools.outputShape: Policy decision with allowed/requiresApproval/reasons plus the governing rules.

tools.name: kernel.security.dlp
tools.description: Redact secrets from text (DLP). Returns the redacted text and the secret rules that matched.
tools.outputShape: Redacted text plus findings (rule and count) and total redactions.

tools.name: kernel.refactor.dead_code
tools.description: Detect dead code with no dependencies: orphan files (unreachable from entrypoints), unused dependencies, and unused-export candidates.
tools.outputShape: Dead-code report with status, orphanFiles, unusedDependencies, unusedExport candidates, and a summary.

examples.description: Scan the repo for dead code.

failureModes: Orphan files or unused dependencies are present (or unused exports under strict).

tools.name: kernel.loops.list
tools.description: List the available engineering loops (refactor-clean, bugfix, feature, hardening-audit) with their phases and required gates.
tools.outputShape: Array of loop definitions with id, title, whenToUse, mutates, phases, and requiredGates.

tools.name: kernel.loops.select
tools.description: Select the best engineering loop for a goal (explicit > learned per-repo override > goal classification).
tools.outputShape: Selection with the chosen loop id, source (explicit/learned/classified), and reason.

examples.description: Pick a loop for a bug.

failureModes: The goal is empty and no loop is provided.

tools.name: kernel.loops.learn
tools.description: Record a per-repo default engineering loop so future runs select it automatically.
tools.sideEffects: Writes a per-repo loop override to the local learning store.
tools.outputShape: The recorded loop override.

examples.description: Default this repo to the refactor-clean loop.

tools.name: kernel.loops.run
tools.description: Run an engineering loop for a goal: select the loop, execute its phases as gates through the operate executor with bounded repair, and report a typed stop reason with evidence.
tools.sideEffects: Runs the loop's gates, records proofs, and writes the proof graph.
tools.outputShape: Operate report plus loopSelection and loop stop reason (completed, required_gate_failed, needs_work, blocked_needs_approval).
failureModes: A required-before-exit gate fails and cannot be repaired within budget.
Acceptance criteria are missing, so implementation is blocked.
